name: reteno
description: Reteno's AI agent. Less clicking, more doing.

interface.shortDescription: Reteno's AI agent. Less clicking, more doing.
interface.longDescription: Meet the Reteno Agent: the teammate who never gets tired, never says "I'll circle back," and is suspiciously enthusiastic about doing the boring stuff for you. It helps your team work with Reteno in Codex or Cowork, answer questions, dig things up, and keep workflows moving without turning every task into a small corporate tragedy. Think of it as an extra pair of hands, except faster, calmer, and much better at remembering where things are.
defaultPrompt: Use Reteno to read or update an existing Reteno email message by ID.
Use Reteno to analyze an onboarding funnel URL and produce a step-by-step summary.
